title: Thyrsanthus brasiliensis
taxonomy: Thyrsanthus brasiliensis is a species of orchid, and it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its characteristics and morphology. The species is further classified into the genus Thyrsanthus, which is a small group of orchids native to South America. Thyrsanthus brasiliensis is closely related to other orchids in the same family, sharing common characteristics such as flowers and growth habits. The exact classification of Thyrsanthus brasiliensis may be subject to further research and revision.
